text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf and I are training on the track
when an unexpected visitor appears.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ah, there you are.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I need to have a word with you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Brian? What brings you here?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The director barged her way into the student
council office and started ranting about some
kind of emergency.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It seemed like a pain, so I figured I'd let you sort
it out.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I see. I had better take care of this immediately.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Trainer, but I need to speak with Brian. I
shouldn't be long.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This matter has turned out to be far more
complex than I anticipated.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Addressing it will require some decisive moves on
the part of the student council president—which
is to say, me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm afraid I need some time to bring it to a proper
resolution.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Actually, it might take the rest of the day to deal
with.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Although, if I were to prioritize only the parts
that require my input, I could be done in short
order.
choice_data_list: Take the time to do it right.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You're correct, of course. Thank you for
understanding.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I will spend the rest of the day giving this matter
my full attention.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'll see you tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Symboli Rudolf resolves
Director Akikawa's emergency within the day.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Of course. I won't be long.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'm back. Sorry to have kept you waiting.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I told you I could do my part in short order, didn't
I? Brian and the others will start work on the rest.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Not to worry. I will rejoin them once we are
finished here.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Now, where were we?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Symboli Rudolf manages to
navigate her obligations with the finesse I've
come to expect.
